original_image_tags: Scanned image of a worn, off-white document page. The top edge has two hole-punch holes and a torn corner. The center of the page is largely blank with faint bleed-through text from the opposite side. Several stamps and markings are visible.
A rectangular red stamp block in the top left corner with several lines of text, partially obscured by a white adhesive label covering the center. Visible text includes:
A vertical stamp in red ink along the left margin.
Faint, bleed-through text from the opposite side of the page is visible across the center, but it is illegible and reversed.
Two stamps in the bottom left corner.
Two stamps in the bottom right corner, one of which is rotated 90 degrees clockwise.

elements.description: Back of a document page with faint bleed-through text. Visible stamps include a purple 'COPY' stamp on the left, a blue FBI stamp in the bottom right reading 'REC'D - COORD & ICURS', 'FBI', 'APR 13 10 25 AM '66', and a faint 'DEC 50' stamp. A white label with text is partially visible on the top left.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text from stamps (e.g., 'COPY', 'REC'D - COORD & ICURS', 'FBI', 'APR 13 10 25 AM '66', 'DEC 50') while Description A states the stamps are partially obscured, illegible, or does not provide specific text, creating a contradiction on quoted text and visual content details.
